section.div: Escalation of Privilege to the root through sudo binary with chroot option. CVE-2025-32463
Various patches necessary for certain ATI/AMD/Intel/Nvidia GPUs, also fixed to work on Intel 11/12th Gen Tiger/Alder Lake
